summary: Iteration 153: Cosmic Insights & Weather System - ALL TESTS PASSED (28/28 backend, all frontend UI verified). New feature: Featured Reports & Cosmic Weather dashboard with AI-powered forecasts, Stories-style highlights reel, zodiac/lunar tracking, tool recommendations, RPG stat boosts, and gem-locked Deep-Dive analysis.
seed_data_creation: Used existing rpg_test user with 1 mood, 1 meditation, 1 journal, 1-day streak
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cosmic Insights & Weather System fully implemented and tested. Backend routes at /app/backend/routes/reports.py. Frontend at /app/frontend/src/pages/CosmicInsights.js. Key data-testids: cosmic-insights-page, insights-back-btn, scholar-bonus-btn, highlights-reel, highlight-meditation, highlight-mood, highlight-streak, cosmic-weather-card, weekly-stats, peak-hours, deep-dive-section, unlock-deep-dive-btn, scripture-progress. Cosmic weather is cached daily in cosmic_weather_cache collection. AI forecasts use Gemini 3 Flash. Scholar's Bonus awards +25 XP once per week. Deep-Dive costs 50 gems for non-premium users.

GET /api/reports/cosmic-weather.details: Returns zodiac (sign, element), lunar (phase, energy, xp_bonus), AI forecast, tool_recommendations (mixer freq/sound, sacred_text), rpg_bonuses (stat_boosts, lunar_xp_bonus)

GET /api/reports/insights.details: Returns highlights reel (Stories-style cards), mood_report, meditation_report, soundscape_report, journal_report, scripture_report, rpg_summary

GET /api/reports/deep-dive (locked).details: Returns locked=true, cost=50, currency=gems, preview.features for non-premium users

POST /api/reports/scholar-bonus.details: Awards +25 XP first time, returns 400 on duplicate claim same week

GET /api/reports/elemental-affinities.details: Returns current_season, element, stat_boosts, lunar, boosted_items, description

Frontend /cosmic-insights page.details: Page loads with header, highlights reel, cosmic weather card, weekly stats, deep-dive section

Frontend Stories-style highlights.details: 3 highlight cards shown (meditation, mood, streak) with action buttons

Frontend Cosmic Weather card.details: Shows Aries Season (Fire), Waxing Gibbous moon, AI forecast, 528Hz mixer, sacred text

Frontend Deep-Dive section.details: Shows locked state with Premium badge and 'Unlock for 50 Gems' button

Frontend Scholar's Bonus button.details: Button visible, clickable, hides after claim

Frontend Dashboard Insights link.details: Insights action in Today group navigates to /cosmic-insights
